title: wind bottle
description: Not enough Wind Charge? This mod allows you to get more mods for Wind Charge
body: When you want to play wind charge in survival, you find that killing the breeze can only be combined into 8 wind charge. This mod will help you solve this problem in three ways: Right-click the stray with a glass bottle Right-click the breeze holding a glass bottle The main hand is a glass bottle, or there are glass bottle drops within a radius of 10 blocks from the player, and the player or the glass bottle drop speed is greater than or equal to (>=)1 (1block/tick) for 5s to obtain an Wind Bottle, which can then be broken down into a Wind charge in [a number of ways](#crafting) to dismantle and return a glass bottle. # up-date ## 1.1.0 Added the ability to right-click Flint in OminousItemSpawnerEntity to get the corresponding item. But there is still one **bug** at the moment: Quickly collecting two items in a row with flint after the OminousItemSpawnerEntity appears will cause the current spawner to no longer generate the OminousItemSpawnerEntity ## 1.2.0 Removed the workbench decomposition method and added two decomposition methods： here condition>Within a 10-block radius of the player: 1. It is a drop and is 300 ticks (15s) during the day. drop time is 50tick(2.5s): 3. The light level is greater than or equal to (>=) 10 4. Being in water 5. The biome is desert 6. The dimension is nether 8. The main hand of the fox (the item in the mouth) is wind bottle 100tick (5s) 9. The item display frame is wind bottle 0tick (0s) Newly added crafting methods, now the following crafting methods are: 1.Right-click the stray with a glass bottle 2.Right-click the breeze holding a glass bottle 3.The main hand is a glass bottle, or there are glass bottle drops within a radius of 10 blocks from the player, and the player or the glass bottle drop speed is greater than or equal to (>=)1 (1block/tick) for 5s ### 1.2.1 add support to create add a recipe can spread ![wind_bottle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4bc4e52cd0b0798250770633414ec91a12d83d1.png)
